title: quirl
body:
# quirl

Named after the Cooking Utensil [Quirl](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quirl_(K%C3%BCchenger%C3%A4t)) [(German)](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Quirl) / [Schneebesen](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Schneebesen) [(German)](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Schneebesen)

# For Players
### This is a Library Mod and is not useful without another mod that depends on `quirl`.
